Get To Know Us

3 months ago
​prefect nice looking helmet def worth the price
Marley R.
Verified buyer
3 months ago
​This is my 2nd Quantum X. I like the round oval shape as it fits my head perfect!
Walter R.
Verified buyer
3 months ago
​The jacket performed exactly as I hoped it would during a recent 800 mile trip through Arizona Backcountry Discovery Routes. Temps were from the 30’s in the mornings and into the 70’s in the late afternoons. Jacket kept me warm in the morning and was able to adjust with all the ventilation to be comfortable in the afternoon. I am 6’ 230lb (Beefy) and the XXL fit pretty good. I recommend this jacket
Tim L.
Verified buyer
3 months ago
​Arai helmets fit great. They are expensive and worth it.
David P.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
Absolutely love it!
Kevin D.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
Forma Phantom's vented or non they are as good as it gets!
R. V.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
​The Klim Marrakesh is the go to summer riding jacket. I am 6 ft. and 210 lb. I usually order a XXL but based on the excellent review from Motorcyclegear.com the XL is just right. The length is just right, even on a sportbike. It has better flexibility and range of motion than your favorite hoodie. Sleeve length also just right it stays at the top of your gloves even at fun time speeds. The medium grey with blue trim unique to M.G.com is classy and looks like a normal jacket you can wear even not riding. Well done guys, between the products and quick and helpful service with awesome prices you've earned my business. The same can be said by the people I have sent your way, well done.
Christopher B.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
​Great boot. Holds a great balance of comfort and protection, and the boa system works well. Ill change my review if they fall apart but no issues so far. They are my everyday riding boot.
Calvin R.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
​most comfortable jacket I've owned, highly recommended
John R.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
​Great shirt. Nice fabric and fits perfectly.
Paul T.
Verified buyer
1 year ago
I was looking at other low rise boots before settling on this one. Very well constructed, yet not difficult to walk in. I have wide feet- usually a 10-10.5 E. I bought a size 11 and the fit well. However- they are still not wide enough. I purchased a boot stretcher online and after a couple of weeks with gradual stretching and nightly walks around the block, they fit perfectly. I haven't been able to test the waterproof-ness riding yet, but stomping through the snow, my feet stay warm and dry. Not the best hiking boots but for touring, they will work well. No air flow, so they will be hot in the summer.
Scott H.
